news.title: Where we've been. Where we're headed. at Consensus yesterday. agent tools have already transformed what agents can do & it's just getting started... we believe there will be a rich economy for agent tools that's not just about vibes & marketing, but that drives economic value too this market can & should be onchain this ERC by

Agent Tool Registry, ERC-8257 the 403 to x402's 402. x402 lets agents pay. but anyone who pays gets in. this gates by anything onchain: NFTs, subs, ZK, allowlists, capacity caps, whatever you can write. publish a tool. pick a predicate. get paid. keep reading

Kaniza, one of Japan's most prominent animators, is debuting on OpenSea. ASMR Animation ft. Emoji Girl: 6 hand-drawn pieces. Open edition. Random draw. Collect all 6 and unlock the Magical Version airdrop. A rare secret collab lives in the collection. Keep an eye out
Mint is live: Just got on boarded to the mobile app. I must say the app is dope, easy to use and very clean UI Thank you and shout out to for the connect

Azuki is heading to Licensing Expo Las Vegas. With a trading card game, an upcoming manga, and Shao at the heart of it all - we'll be on the floor with the world's biggest IPs. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US.
